title: Encrypted API
description: A Library used by all of Cryptic's mods
body:
**Elevate Your Minecraft Experience with Encrypted API**

Unleash the full potential of your Minecraft modding projects with Encrypted API, the ultimate API/Library mod designed to bridge the gap between creativity and functionality. Developed for the Forge platform, Encrypted API introduces a suite of advanced tools and utilities aimed at both novice and veteran modders. With Encrypted API, transforming your imaginative concepts into reality has never been easier.

Key Features:

OBJ Model Integration: Seamlessly convert and render OBJ models in Minecraft, enabling you to bring intricate designs and complex structures to life within your game world.

Easing Functions: Implement smooth transitions and animations with our comprehensive collection of easing functions, adding a layer of polish and professionalism to your mods.

Quaternion Utilities: Master the complexities of rotation and orientation with our Quaternion utilities, ensuring your entities and models align perfectly in any scenario.

Camera Utilities: Gain complete control over the game's viewpoint with our Camera Utils, allowing for dynamic angles and immersive gameplay experiences.

Circular Buffer Tracker: Efficiently manage and track data with our Circular Buffer Tracker, optimizing performance without compromising on functionality.

Environmental Effects: Enhance the atmosphere of your Minecraft worlds with customizable environmental effects, from subtle ambient enhancements to dramatic weather changes.

Gamerule Factory: Tailor the game's rules to your liking with our Gamerule Factory, offering unparalleled flexibility in customizing gameplay mechanics.
